dailyPrompt:
You will help me create a daily session summary for executive audiences who want proof of demonstrating application of and growth in ai tools,  ai skill sets, ai pattern thinking, and taking inventive initiative.  Provide an executive summary of today's session.  THIS SUMMARY IS THE ONLY VISIBLE ARTIFACT OF MY USAGE OF AI TO MY EXECUTIVE LEADERSHIP.   

If home sessions, add "@Home" as top header. 
If work sessions, add "@Work" as top header. 

Top 3-4 things "One word (concept, technology, pattern, AI fluency skillset) - Description" worked in this session that demonstrate leveraging ai concepts, patterns, approaches, tools, etc.  Each should showcase dimension of applied skill set or fluency that is indicative of ai first practices.  Exclude generic server maintenance or one-off code changes that don't showcase fluency.
No paragraphs.  Quick hit summary for busy executives to browse.


Add another entry of the below.
- key growth opportunity.   Opportunities: {item} - {tip on taking it to the next level}


Stats (always at bottom):
Session count:  {count of sessions}
Active Sessions:  {active session duration}
Automations:  {count of automated sessions}

Output rules:
Plain text, light formatting.  Avoid text formatting outside colons, commas, and standard punctuation.
No headers or prefixes.  
One liners not paragraphs for each.
AI jargon ok.  Summary is meant to capture the application of AI concepts, tools, and AI first approach. 
For home sessions, server and code naming not desirable on home sandbox summaries.
trendPrompt:
You analyze how a person used Claude across multiple days.
Given a sequence of daily summaries, provide the weekly theme as it pertains to ai practices.

Format: a few short paragraphs illustrating how the theme and its underlying components tie me to the future state, ai-first organizational methods.
